programme.title: The Nature of Things

programme.title: I Am Luke Perry
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the life and career of the actor, who rose from obscurity to become a 1990s heart-throb and pop culture icon. With contributions from Stephen Baldwin, John McNaughton, Jason Priestley, Marisol Nichols and Gabriel Correa.

programme.title: My Icon: Martin Offiah
programme.desc: The former rugby league superstar discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and career.

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Documentary charting the singer's rise to stardom, built around a cache of recently uncovered audio tapes in which a young Madonna reflects on her extraordinary life and career. Plus, rare footage, unseen photos and interviews with family, friends and collaborators.

programme.title: I Am Patrick Swayze
programme.desc: A tribute to the American actor, known for his roles in hits like Dirty Dancing, Ghost and The Outsiders. With contributions by Demi Moore and Rob Lowe among others.

programme.title: Giroud
programme.desc: A profile of footballer Olivier Giroud, who is France's all-time leading goalscorer and has played for Arsenal, Chelsea and AC Milan.

programme.title: SIC: Prince of MotoGP
programme.desc: Profile of MotoGP rider Marco Simoncelli, made to mark the 10th anniversary of his death.

programme.title: Seve
programme.desc: Discover the story of golfer Severiano Ballesteros, told by his brothers and contemporary players.

programme.title: Discovering: Alain Delon
programme.desc: A profile of the French actor, who worked with directors including Luchino Visconti, Jean-Luc Godard, Jean-Pierre Melville, Michelangelo Antonioni and Louis Malle.

programme.title: The Sixties
programme.desc: The events surrounding the assassination of US president John F Kennedy in November 1963 are examined through eyewitness accounts and details of the original investigation.

programme.title: Discovering: Maggie Smith
programme.desc: A profile of the English actress, who won Oscars for The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie and California Suite and starred in Downton Abbey and the Harry Potter films.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of American film-maker Nancy Meyers, known for The Parent Trap, The Holiday and Something's Gotta Give.

programme.title: Shaq
programme.desc: Powered by the unstoppable duo of Shaq and Kobe Bryant, the Lakers cement themselves as the league's dominant force by winning three consecutive NBA titles - but simmering tension between the two superstars threatens to derail the dynasty and forces the team to make a decision on each man's future in LA.

programme.title: The Good Fight Club
programme.desc: Chloe prepares for her cage return after surgery, but Steve fears she is slacking, while Thomas gets a glimpse of the future.

programme.title: The Nazi Cartel
programme.desc: Levine feels betrayed when Roberto Suarez's men are released, while Klaus Altmann, neo-Nazi mercenaries and the military help Suarez enact the deadliest coup in Bolivian history.

programme.title: Discovering: Michael Caine
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the English actor, who starred in Alfie and The Italian Job and won Oscars for his roles in Hannah and Her Sisters and The Cider House Rules.

programme.title: Terry Venables: A Man Can Dream
programme.desc: A look at the life and times of the football player-turned-manager, who died in November 2023, intertwined with the story of England's unforgettable run at Euro 96, with insight from players, friends and family.

programme.title: Bobby Robson: More Than a Manager
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the career of the much-loved former England, Barcelona and Newcastle United manager. Via the Hand of God and Paul Gascoigne's tears, to titles across Europe, Robson overcame the most extreme challenges - including fighting for his life after being diagnosed with cancer - before returning to football to manage his beloved Newcastle.

programme.title: Bobby
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating Bobby Moore, exploring his football career, including leading the England team to victory in the 1966 world cup, and the personal challenges he faced both on the pitch and in retirement. Featuring archive footage and contributions from family, friends and celebrity fans.

programme.title: The Alien Autopsy Scandal
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the story of two music entrepreneurs in the mid-1990s who claimed to have unearthed top-secret footage showing the corpse of an alien recovered from a 1947 crash site near Roswell, New Mexico. They set out to show it to the world, but first they had to find the money to buy it from the ex-military cameraman who holds the film reels.

programme.title: Tina
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome.

programme.title: Salt Path: A Very British Scandal
programme.desc: A look at Observer journalist Chloe Hadjimatheou's investigation into allegations of factual inaccuracies in Raynor Winn's book The Salt Path.

programme.title: Spitfire
programme.desc: The story of the British single-seat fighter plane the Supermarine Spitfire, designed by RJ Mitchell and famous for its role in the Battle of Britain. Archive footage, new film of the aircraft in flight and interviews with the last surviving veterans who flew the plane in combat combine to tell its story.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team is forced to step in when Ben is injured by the alpha male during the chimp introduction. Orangutan Hsiao-Quai struggles with her ever-growing son Kai, and staff at Monkey World prepare to welcome a new arrival.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: A four-month-old woolly monkey is hand-reared, and there is excitement in the endangered golden-cheeked gibbons' enclosure when it is revealed Zoey may be pregnant.

programme.title: Wild Science
programme.desc: A look at the ocean's most formidable predator, uncovering the biology behind its survival across extinctions and the lethal hunting skills of bull sharks.

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: A look at K'gari in Queensland, also known as Fraser Island, with footage of stingrays hunting soldier crabs in the tidal shallows, acid frogs evading vicious predators.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: The importance of waterholes in the dry landscape, secret pockets of paradise and a vital pipeline of life which host an array of birds, insects, fish and freshwater crocodiles.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: A 13-year-old leopard that has dominated two square miles of territory for years faces a challenge from a younger, stronger rival.

programme.title: Brazil Untamed
programme.desc: The capybara is a stunning creature - a rodent that is the size of a sheep. Cameras explore the wetland home of these animals to see how they live their daily lives.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: The endless cycle of moving water as African rivers flow to find the ocean, revealing how they always seem to find their way, despite unthinkable obstacles.

programme.title: Arctic Secrets
programme.desc: The world's largest uninhabited island, Devon Island, which is so remote that scientists chose it to simulate conditions on Mars. Only the toughest survive.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Southern Africa is gripped in a punishing drought. At times like this, water becomes critical to survival and wetlands become magnets for life.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Resident capuchin TJ causes mischief when he joins the new Chilean arrivals, and alpha male Paddy has to step in. Orangutan Amy is pregnant but the keepers worry she will not be able to care for a baby, and chimps from Hananya's group get their teeth cleaned.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team must make an important decision concerning the safety of a chimp group when alpha male Hananya continues to exhibit violent behaviour. programme.title: Africa's Hunters

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation

programme.title: Barnwood Builders

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders return to West Alexander, Pa., to save an American gem built deep within the backwoods at the bottom of a steep hill; this 19th century barn will prove to be one of their toughest takedowns ever.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett helps a young family restore their home, which has been in the family for generations, to its architectural glory while simultaneously creating modern functionality.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1947 postmodern ranch back to its post-World War II style for a military veteran and his wife; however, he has to make some tough decisions when the homeowners want to get rid of the original kitchen tile.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their 1900 Victorian farmhouse in time for their wedding; they're hoping Brett can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms that were closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett renovates a Spanish colonial revival; its original woodwork has been covered over with layers of paint; the team engages in painstaking work and hits some serious snags, but the result is a home that takes the owner's breath away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds a 720-square foot stick-frame home completely off the grid in Mont.'s Flathead Valley.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace an off-the-grid life in Isla Mujeres, Mexico; Beal hires Richart Sowa and his son, Eden, to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple looks to bring the shores of Key West to their donkey sanctuary in Missouri; despite having experience with building off-grid properties, they face new challenges as they attempt to construct a double container home deep in the woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family is determined to build an off-the-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River; the family members take on Class 5 rapids to portage out materials, and they must race to complete their cabin before low tide hits and they can't return home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites, leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
